items.title: Laowa 4.5-10mm f/2.8 CF Zoom Fisheye Announced – Dual Fisheye Look for APS-C and MFT
items.summary: Laowa has unveiled the 4.5-10mm f/2.8 CF Zoom Fisheye, a palm-sized manual zoom for APS-C and Micro Four Thirds cameras that shifts from a 180° circular fisheye at the wide end to a diagonal fisheye a…

items.title: The Story Behind The Last Photograph of Oscar Wilde on His Death Bed
items.summary: The last known photograph of literary icon Oscar Wilde was taken on his death bed in a Paris hotel room using a borrowed camera and a volatile early flash, mere hours after he passed away. [Read More]

items.title: Performance Cuts Through the Noise at the Venice Biennale
items.summary: Florentina Holzinger and Miet Warlop transform the Austrian and Belgian pavilions into immersive spectacles of endurance, ecological dread, and controlled collapse.

items.title: Drake Becomes First Artist to Hold Top Three Billboard 200 Spots
items.summary: Iceman, Habibti, and Maid of Honour just made history

items.title: “It Takes Two” Rapper Rob Base Dies at 59
items.summary: The Harlem MC, who was one-half of the duo Rob Base & DJ E-Z Rock, had been living with cancer
